prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-WBSTAS-28PC-28PC-BRNZ Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 28pc Wood Burning Wood Working and Assorted Soldering Tips Stencil Set Crafting Description: The 28pc Wood Burning & Soldering Tips Set is a great addition to your wood working or soldering tool collection. This set comes with everything you'll need for your wood working projects: wood carving tips, wood embossing tips, soldering tips, hot knife chuck and blade, number, letter and basic symbols stencils.

This set is great for wood working, hobbies, crafting, home improvement and more. Make sure to grab one before your next project. Search Terms: wood working carving tools chiseling hobby soldering tips burning stencil craft set Features: - 28pc Wood Burning Tips Set - Wood Carving Tips - Wood Embossing Tips - Hot Knife Chuck & Blade - Number, Letter & Basic Symbols Stencils === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 28pc Wood Burning and Soldering Tips Set

tokens.name: Wood Burning and Soldering Tips Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 28-pk Wood Burning Tips Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Wood Carving Tips, Embossing Tips, Hot Knife Chuck And Blade, Number Letter Symbol Stencils

openai.title_differentiation: Wood Carving Tips, Wood Embossing Tips, Hot Knife Chuck And Blade, Number Letter And Symbol Stencils
